programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Hapai ke kuko, hanau ka hewa

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: E'ao lu'au a kualima
programme.desc: Junior is torn between his duties and his feelings for his former girlfriend when her new man is one of the culprits in a bank heist-turned-homicide.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ai No I Ka 'Ape He Mane'o No Ko Ka Nuku
programme.desc: Tani and Junior go undercover at a gym to track down a deadly batch of steroids; Danny and McGarrett work as bodyguards for Danny's high maintenance ex-mother-in-law, a famous romance novelist with whom he has never gotten along.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Pupuhi Ka He'e O Kai Uli
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a window washer and finds that the victim is actually a renowned street artist; Grover and Adam look into the murder of a gambler; Junior helps his father when they are reminded of his sister's death.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ke Ala O Ka Pu

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.sub-title: Charades

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Forget Me Nots

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.sub-title: Master of Horror

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: And God Said to Cain
programme.desc: A man takes his revenge on the family responsible for his wrongful sentence to ten years of hard labor.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: The muscular Hercules performs his labors, sails with the Argonauts, and romances the fair Iole.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: All the Way Boys
programme.desc: A pair of conniving bush pilots crash-land in the Peruvian jungle, where they come across a community of diamond miners under the thumb of a greedy speculator.

programme.title: Boss
programme.desc: Two black bounty hunters, pursuing an outlaw, take over a small Western town without a sheriff.

But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: CLASS OF 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.
